waves.name: v2 Polish
waves.goal: Complete simemu v2 session API, add build wrapper, cross-platform naming

waves.name: Proof Reliability
waves.goal: Make proof capture and app-target validation deterministic across iOS, Android, and the menu bar app

waves.name: Productization

waves.name: Ops Hardening
waves.goal: Harden session state, diagnostics, APIs, and recovery paths for long-running shared-desktop use
